ogTitle: Porters Retreat vs Possum Brush: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Porters Retreat and Possum Brush.
heading: Porters Retreat vs Possum Brush — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Porters Retreat, New South Wales and Possum Brush, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Porters Retreat has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Possum Brush (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Porters Retreat or Possum Brush safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Porters Retreat has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Possum Brush scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Porters Retreat scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Possum Brush scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Porters Retreat or Possum Brush?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Porters Retreat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
